old_l0.text: Optimize for time-to-market. Ship features fast; accept technical debt; prefer simple over robust.
old_l0.summary: Optimize for time-to-market. Ship features fast; accept technical debt; prefer simple over robust.

new_l0.text: Optimize for operational reliability. Production stability over shipping speed; observability and graceful degradation are first-class; correctness over convenience.
new_l0.summary: Optimize for operational reliability. Production stability over shipping speed; observability and graceful degradation are first-class; correctness over convenience.

decisions.text: Use Redis as a read-through cache without write-through; accept stale reads for 30s.
No unit tests for route handlers; relied on E2E tests hitting them indirectly.
TypeScript strict mode enabled from day 1.
decisions.applies_when: Catches bugs at compile time; small upfront cost, lots of downstream savings.

decisions.text: Deploy by running a script on our laptops.
decisions.applies_when: CI/CD would be 1-2 weeks of setup we can't afford now.
Faster UI prototyping than rolling our own.

decisions.text: Let errors propagate; we'll add boundaries once the app is actually user-facing.

decisions.applies_when: Faster installs, better monorepo support. Saves ~10s per install.
One region keeps ops simple. Multi-region is 2+ weeks of setup and 2x the cost.
Use ENV vars instead of a feature-flag service. Simple, no external dependency.

decisions.text: Push to SQS, don't wait for ack, don't retry.
